About the Program
California Children’s Services (CCS) is a countywide program for children birth to 21 years of age with certain physical limitations and chronic health conditions or diseases.
CCS can authorize and pay for specific medical services and equipment provided by CCS-approved specialists with prior authorization. In addition, CCS offers a medical therapy program that provides occupational and physical therapy services to medically eligible children.
CCS will not meet all your child’s health needs, only those related to the CCS eligible condition. CCS is not a health insurance program.
Eligibility Requirements
County Resident Requirement
Age Requirement
Financial Conditions
Medically Eligible Condition
Client Application Process
A CCS referral form can be completed by anyone. However, a CCS application for services must be completed by the child’s parent or legal guardians.
Referrals and applications are accepted by phone, mail, or fax.
Please be sure to submit both the referral and the application form.
Application to Determine CCS Program Eligibility
(
Solicitude Para Determinar la Elegibilidad del Programa CCS)
